pages.text:
March 2021
BALLOON KNOT INC
C/O TRI STAR SPORTS & ENT
9255 SUNSET BLVD 2ND FL
WEST HOLLYWOOD CA  90069
Dear Royalty Participant,
Enclosed please find a copy of your June 2020 period end royalty statement.
If you are due royalties and currently receive a royalty payment by check, your payment has
already been mailed separately from this royalty statement. For future royalty payments, please
sign-up for electronic payment into any valid bank account. An application form is attached or
can be downloaded at:
https://sme-artistportal.com/resources/downloads/cashOutRegistration/us_en_co_registration.pdf.
Further to our communication of May 20th 2019, we are pleased to confirm that we have started
the roll out of the two new features that allow our artists and other royalty participants to view
and withdraw earnings faster than ever before: Real Time Royalties and Cash Out.
Real Time Royalties, is available anytime, anywhere through the Sony Music Artist Portal and
provides you with immediate updates about your global royalty earnings and account balances
as soon as we receive financial reporting from hundreds of digital distribution services on a
monthly basis. This major speed improvement eliminates the need to wait for periodic reporting
cycles to see your royalty earnings and account balances. You’ll also be able to use the Sony
Music Artist Portal’s industry-leading analytics capabilities to interpret your Real Time Royalties
data in robust and powerful ways, giving you faster insights into your earnings trends so you can
make highly-informed decisions.
Cash Out gives you even greater control over your money by providing you with the ability to
request a withdrawal of all or part of your payable balance every month, using the Sony Music
Artist Portal. There are no fees and no charges to use Cash Out and we will continue to issue
payment of any remaining account balances that have not been withdrawn through Cash Out on
our normal payment schedule.
If you are already a registered user of the Sony Music Artist Portal and are receiving your
payments by  electronic method then please use the Contact Us section of the Artist Portal or
email royalty.statements@sonymusic.com to request your authorization to use the Cash Out
feature. To take advantage of Cash Out you must be signed-up for electronic payment method
(ACH or wire) into a valid bank account.
If you do not already have access to the Sony Music Artist Portal and are not receiving your
payments by electronic method, to register your interest and start the sign up process please
complete the attached electronic payment sign up form. Return your completed form together
with the information in RED below to the Royalty Helpdesk at royalty.statements@sonymusic.com
and we will initiate the Artist Portal registration process.

text_blocks.text:
March 2021
BALLOON KNOT INC
C/O TRI STAR SPORTS & ENT
9255 SUNSET BLVD 2ND FL
WEST HOLLYWOOD CA  90069
Dear Royalty Participant,
Enclosed please find a copy of your June 2020 period end royalty statement.

If you are due royalties and currently receive a royalty payment by check, your payment has
already been mailed separately from this royalty statement. For future royalty payments, please
sign-up for electronic payment into any valid bank account. An application form is attached or
can be downloaded at:
https://sme-artistportal.com/resources/downloads/cashOutRegistration/us_en_co_registration.pdf.

Further to our communication of May 20th 2019, we are pleased to confirm that we have started
the roll out of the two new features that allow our artists and other royalty participants to view
and withdraw earnings faster than ever before: Real Time Royalties and Cash Out.

Real Time Royalties, is available anytime, anywhere through the Sony Music Artist Portal and
provides you with immediate updates about your global royalty earnings and account balances
as soon as we receive financial reporting from hundreds of digital distribution services on a
monthly basis. This major speed improvement eliminates the need to wait for periodic reporting
cycles to see your royalty earnings and account balances. You’ll also be able to use the Sony
Music Artist Portal’s industry-leading analytics capabilities to interpret your Real Time Royalties
data in robust and powerful ways, giving you faster insights into your earnings trends so you can
make highly-informed decisions.

Cash Out gives you even greater control over your money by providing you with the ability to
request a withdrawal of all or part of your payable balance every month, using the Sony Music
Artist Portal. There are no fees and no charges to use Cash Out and we will continue to issue
payment of any remaining account balances that have not been withdrawn through Cash Out on
our normal payment schedule.

If you are already a registered user of the Sony Music Artist Portal and are receiving your
payments by  electronic method then please use the Contact Us section of the Artist Portal or
email royalty.statements@sonymusic.com to request your authorization to use the Cash Out
feature. To take advantage of Cash Out you must be signed-up for electronic payment method
(ACH or wire) into a valid bank account.

If you do not already have access to the Sony Music Artist Portal and are not receiving your
payments by electronic method, to register your interest and start the sign up process please
complete the attached electronic payment sign up form. Return your completed form together
with the information in RED below to the Royalty Helpdesk at royalty.statements@sonymusic.com
and we will initiate the Artist Portal registration process.

pages.text:
If you are already receiving your payments by electronic method and want to obtain access to
the Artist Portal and take advantage of the new features, you will need to provide us with the
following information and forward your request to royalty.statements@sonymusic.com :
Your Name
Your Vendor Number(s) - see below
Your Email Address
Your Mailing Address
Your Tax ID Number or Social Security Number (Last 4 digits)
Your Vendor Number(s) can be located in the upper right hand corner of your royalty
statement(s) - see screen shot below.
Use of the Sony Music Artist Portal, including Real Time Royalties and Cash Out, are subject to
applicable terms and conditions.
If you have any questions, please contact the Sony Music Entertainment Royalty Helpdesk at
royalty.statements@sonymusic.com, telephone (201) 777-3448 or fax (201) 777-3047.
Kind regards,
Nick Lodge
Senior Vice President, Royalties Services

USER_1
USER_2
Section IV: Artist Portal & Copyright Online Statement Access
The Cash-Out feature is provided as an accommodation to artists and participants. SME has the right, in its sole and absolute discretion, to
approve or reject any Cash-Out requests. The approval or rejection of a Cash-Out request does not negate any provisions contained in
contract(s) with SME. The Cash-Out request does not create a separate contractual right to receive cash payments beyond the terms
contained in contracts with SME. Artists and participants should rely on advice from their own tax advisors when signing up to the Cash-Out
feature. An artist or participant can make one Cash-Out request in any 30 day period. Subject to satisfying local invoicing requirements,
Cash-Out requests submitted on or before the 10th day of any month will be settled on or around the 15th day of that month, while Cash-Out
requests submitted after the 10th of any month will be settled by the 15th of the following month.
 5f. Artist E-mail Address for Cash-Out Notification:
 5e. Company Name:
 5d.Telephone Number:
 5c. E-mail Address:
 5b. Last Name:
 5a. First Name:
 Note: Cash Out access is currently only available to Artist/Producer vendors and JV vendors. The authorized e-mail address
 cannot be a general or shared E-mail account.
Section V: Cash-Out Authorization (Not Applicable to Copyright Vendors)
V18
Thank you for assisting us in maintaining up to date records regarding your royalty account. Once your form is received by Sony Music, your change
request will be reviewed. We will contact you if additional supporting documentation is required in order to ensure the accuracy and validity of your
request. Sony Music reserves the right to require you to sign and deliver an affidavit affirming the information provided to Sony Music herein.
*TODAY’S DATE:
             /         /
          *AUTHORIZED SIGNER’S
            NAME:
          *AUTHORIZED SIGNER’S
            SIGNATURE:
By signing below, I warrant and represent that: (a) I have full and complete authority to request
the electronic payment method set forth herein to the account(s) referenced above, and, if the
party requesting such payment method is an entity, I am fully authorized to act and request such
update on behalf of such entity; (b) the implementation of the update requested herein will not
violate or infringe upon the rights of any other party; (c) the information stated herein is truthful
and accurate; and (d) I shall indemnify and hold Sony Music Entertainment harmless against
any and all claims and any and all damages, losses or expenses Sony Music Entertainment may
incur by reason of implementation of the update requested herein and/or as a result of the
breach of any of the foregoing warranties and representations.
Please check here to confirm a W-9 Tax Form (U.S. resident),  W-8BEN, W-8BEN-E or 8233 (non U.S. resident)
       has been attached.
If a tax form is not provided, Sony Music Entertainment may be required to withhold taxes from your royalty payment.

pages.text:
Instructions for completing the Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form
The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration form must be completed by all Royalty Participants & JV Partners in order to sign up for the
following services:
1) Electronic Payments by ACH (US Only) or Wire (non-US), 2) Artist Portal Access, & 3) Cash-Out Authorization.
Please note that enrollment in Electronic Payments, either by ACH or Wire, is required in order to register for Artist Portal Access & Cash-Out
Authorization.
The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form must be accompanied by a W9 Tax Form for U.S. residents and a W8-BEN, W8-BEN-E, or
8233 for non U.S. residents.
Failure to properly complete the form and provide a valid tax document may result in delays in processing.
Preparer_Information
The information being requested in this section is for the individual who is completing the form and not necessarily the payee or individual
requesting Artist Portal Access or Cash Out Authorization.
Section_I:_Type_of_Request_(Required)
Please select the appropriate type of request that best fits your registration needs. Multiple requests can be selected, if applicable.
See below.
 Electronic payment information is required for Artist Portal access and Cash-Out authorization. This section can be skipped if the vendor is
     already enrolled in an electronic payment method.
 If you are an existing Artist Portal user who would like to request Cash-Out authorization, and the vendor(s) are already enrolled in 
     electronic payment, you are only required to fill out Section VI: Cash-Out Authorization.
Section_II:_Vendor_Information_(Required)
In this section, please select the vendor type. The request(s) in the form can be applied to multiple vendor types, but will only be
applied to the vendor name specified in field 2b. Please submit a set of forms for each different vendor name (i.e., If you have vendors
named You Productions, Inc. and You Entertainment, Inc., please submit two sets of forms).
Vendor Name/JV Deal Name -The name of the individual/entity authorized to receive royalties/payments or the name of your JV Deal as it 
     exists on the JV Statement
 Vendor Number - Vendor number as it appears on your Royalty Summary Statement
 Royalty Account Number - Contract number that appears in the header of the Royalty Summary Statement
 Address - Current vendor address that appears on your Royalty Summary Statement or JV Statement
 Email Address - Please provide an email address that SME can use for payment remittance notices
Section_III:_Vendor_Bank_Information
*This section should only be completed if you are setting up Electronic Banking for the first time or are changing existing banking
details.
Bank Account Type - Please select Checking or Savings.
Bank Account Holder Name - Individual or company name as it appears on the bank account (not bank name)
Bank Account Number - Bank account number the payments will be deposited to
Bank Name - Name of financial institution (i.e. Bank of America, Royal Bank of Canada)
Bank Address - Address of financial institution, including zip or postal code
U.S. Bank Account Routing Number/FED ABA - Nine digit routing code (please refer to the financial institution for this information)
IBAN - 18 to 34 alphanumeric code used for foreign banks (please refer to the financial institution for this information)
SWIFT/BIC - 8 to 11 characters used to identify a specific bank in an international transaction
Bank Key - Same as the routing number
Branch Number - 5 digit # used mainly in Canada to identify a bank branch.
Intermediary Bank Name - Name of intermediary financial institution. Please verify the intermediary bank with your primary financial institution
Intermediary Bank FED ABA/Routing Number - Provided by intermediary financial institution
Intermediary Bank Address - Address of intermediary financial institution
Section_IV:_Artist_Portal_&_Copyright_Online_Statement_Access
*This section should only be completed if you are registering for the Artist Portal for the first time or making changes to existing
access.
Please list the name and contact information of the individuals that you are authorizing to access the Artist Portal on behalf of the vendor listed
on line 2b.
Section_V:_Cash-Out_Authorization
Please list the name and contact information of the individual that you are authorizing to request Cash-Out on your royalty accounts. Please note
that only one registered user can have access to this functionality per vendor. Please include all account numbers and JV deal names
associated with your request.
The email address of the individual that you are authorizing to request cash withdrawals cannot be a generic or shared mailbox such as
royalty.tracking@mycompany.com.
Authorized Signer - The Authorized Signer is an individual who is authorized by the party contractually entitled to royalties from Sony Music to
request and sign off on the requests being made in this form. Sony Music may require additional documentation, in its sole discretion, to confirm
that the signatory of this form is authorized.

text_blocks.text: Instructions for completing the Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form

The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration form must be completed by all Royalty Participants & JV Partners in order to sign up for the
following services:
1) Electronic Payments by ACH (US Only) or Wire (non-US), 2) Artist Portal Access, & 3) Cash-Out Authorization.

Please note that enrollment in Electronic Payments, either by ACH or Wire, is required in order to register for Artist Portal Access & Cash-Out
Authorization.

The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form must be accompanied by a W9 Tax Form for U.S. residents and a W8-BEN, W8-BEN-E, or
8233 for non U.S. residents.
Failure to properly complete the form and provide a valid tax document may result in delays in processing.

*This section should only be completed if you are setting up Electronic Banking for the first time or are changing existing banking

IBAN - 18 to 34 alphanumeric code used for foreign banks (please refer to the financial institution for this information)
SWIFT/BIC - 8 to 11 characters used to identify a specific bank in an international transaction
Bank Key - Same as the routing number
Branch Number - 5 digit # used mainly in Canada to identify a bank branch.
Intermediary Bank Name - Name of intermediary financial institution. Please verify the intermediary bank with your primary financial institution
Intermediary Bank FED ABA/Routing Number - Provided by intermediary financial institution
Intermediary Bank Address - Address of intermediary financial institution
Section_IV:_Artist_Portal_&_Copyright_Online_Statement_Access

*This section should only be completed if you are registering for the Artist Portal for the first time or making changes to existing
access.
Please list the name and contact information of the individuals that you are authorizing to access the Artist Portal on behalf of the vendor listed
on line 2b.
Section_V:_Cash-Out_Authorization

Please list the name and contact information of the individual that you are authorizing to request Cash-Out on your royalty accounts. Please note
that only one registered user can have access to this functionality per vendor. Please include all account numbers and JV deal names
associated with your request.
The email address of the individual that you are authorizing to request cash withdrawals cannot be a generic or shared mailbox such as
royalty.tracking@mycompany.com.

Authorized Signer - The Authorized Signer is an individual who is authorized by the party contractually entitled to royalties from Sony Music to
request and sign off on the requests being made in this form. Sony Music may require additional documentation, in its sole discretion, to confirm
that the signatory of this form is authorized.

statement_info.contract: number that appears in the header of the Royalty Summary Statement

full_text:
%%CC_DOCTYPE|COVER_LETTER
BALLOON KNOT INC
C/O TRI STAR SPORTS & ENT
9255 SUNSET BLVD 2ND FL
WEST HOLLYWOOD CA  90069


--- PAGE BREAK ---

March 2021
BALLOON KNOT INC
C/O TRI STAR SPORTS & ENT
9255 SUNSET BLVD 2ND FL
WEST HOLLYWOOD CA  90069
Dear Royalty Participant,
Enclosed please find a copy of your June 2020 period end royalty statement.
If you are due royalties and currently receive a royalty payment by check, your payment has
already been mailed separately from this royalty statement. For future royalty payments, please
sign-up for electronic payment into any valid bank account. An application form is attached or
can be downloaded at:
https://sme-artistportal.com/resources/downloads/cashOutRegistration/us_en_co_registration.pdf.
Further to our communication of May 20th 2019, we are pleased to confirm that we have started
the roll out of the two new features that allow our artists and other royalty participants to view
and withdraw earnings faster than ever before: Real Time Royalties and Cash Out.
Real Time Royalties, is available anytime, anywhere through the Sony Music Artist Portal and
provides you with immediate updates about your global royalty earnings and account balances
as soon as we receive financial reporting from hundreds of digital distribution services on a
monthly basis. This major speed improvement eliminates the need to wait for periodic reporting
cycles to see your royalty earnings and account balances. You’ll also be able to use the Sony
Music Artist Portal’s industry-leading analytics capabilities to interpret your Real Time Royalties
data in robust and powerful ways, giving you faster insights into your earnings trends so you can
make highly-informed decisions.
Cash Out gives you even greater control over your money by providing you with the ability to
request a withdrawal of all or part of your payable balance every month, using the Sony Music
Artist Portal. There are no fees and no charges to use Cash Out and we will continue to issue
payment of any remaining account balances that have not been withdrawn through Cash Out on
our normal payment schedule.
If you are already a registered user of the Sony Music Artist Portal and are receiving your
payments by  electronic method then please use the Contact Us section of the Artist Portal or
email royalty.statements@sonymusic.com to request your authorization to use the Cash Out
feature. To take advantage of Cash Out you must be signed-up for electronic payment method
(ACH or wire) into a valid bank account.
If you do not already have access to the Sony Music Artist Portal and are not receiving your
payments by electronic method, to register your interest and start the sign up process please
complete the attached electronic payment sign up form. Return your completed form together
with the information in RED below to the Royalty Helpdesk at royalty.statements@sonymusic.com
and we will initiate the Artist Portal registration process.


--- PAGE BREAK ---

If you are already receiving your payments by electronic method and want to obtain access to
the Artist Portal and take advantage of the new features, you will need to provide us with the
following information and forward your request to royalty.statements@sonymusic.com :
Your Name
Your Vendor Number(s) - see below
Your Email Address
Your Mailing Address
Your Tax ID Number or Social Security Number (Last 4 digits)
Your Vendor Number(s) can be located in the upper right hand corner of your royalty
statement(s) - see screen shot below.
Use of the Sony Music Artist Portal, including Real Time Royalties and Cash Out, are subject to
applicable terms and conditions.
If you have any questions, please contact the Sony Music Entertainment Royalty Helpdesk at
royalty.statements@sonymusic.com, telephone (201) 777-3448 or fax (201) 777-3047.
Kind regards,
Nick Lodge
Senior Vice President, Royalties Services


--- PAGE BREAK ---

SONY MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT
MULTI-PURPOSE REGISTRATION FORM
Please complete this form
and return it using one of the
following methods:
Mail: Sony Music Entertainment
         Attention: Royalty Helpdesk
         301 Route 17 North, 11
th Floor
         Rutherford, NJ 07070 USA
Fax:  (201) 777-3047 
Email: royalty.statements@sonymusic.com
         Attention: Royalty Helpdesk
* Denotes Required Field 
 *Preparer Phone #:
*Preparer Company:
*Preparer E-mail:
*Preparer Name:
Preparer Information
Section I: Type of Request
 
 *1a. Please select the type of registration request:
 
Electronic Payments 
Artist Portal Access 
Cash-Out Authorization
 Please select the appropriate type of request that best fits your registration needs. Multiple requests can be selected, if
 applicable.See below.
 
 Electronic payment information is required for Artist Portal access and Cash-Out authorization. Section III can be skipped if
     the vendor is already enrolled in an electronic payment method.
 *2f. Email Address (for remittance purposes):
 *2e. Address:
  2d. Royalty Account Number(s):
  2c. Vendor Number(s):
 *2b. Vendor Name/JV Deal Name:
Section II: Vendor Information
 *2a. Please select a vendor type:      
Artist Royalty 
Copyright 
JV Partner
 Note: The request(s) in the form can be applied to multiple vendor types, but will only be applied to the vendor specified in field
 2b. Please submit a set of forms for each vendor name (i.e., If you have vendors named You Productions, Inc. and You
 Entertainment, Inc., please submit two sets of forms).
 *3e. Bank Address:
 *3d. Bank Name:
 *3c. Bank Account Number:
 *3b. Bank Account Holder Name:
 
Checking 
Savings
 *3a. Bank Account Type (select one):
                                                          Section III: Vendor Bank Information                       Skip if already enrolled
  *3f. U.S. Bank Account Routing Number/FED ABA:
 
 *ACH: Available to a U.S. bank account only
Payment Type (select ACH for US or Wire Transfer for ex US and complete required fields):


--- PAGE BREAK ---

SONY MUSIC ENTERTAINMENT
MULTI-PURPOSE REGISTRATION FORM
 *3m. Intermediary Bank Address:
 *3l. Intermediary Bank FED ABA/Routing Number:
 *3k. Intermediary Bank Name:
Intermediary Bank Information is for transfers to non US bank accounts. Please contact your primary bank for this information.
 3j. Branch Number:

*3h. Swift/BIC:

* Wire Transfer: Available to a non U.S. bank account
Section III: Vendor Bank Information continued...
 4e. Company Name:

 4c. E-mail Address:
  4h. E-mail Address:
 4b. Last Name:
  4g. Last Name:
  4f. First Name:
 4a. First Name:
USER_1
USER_2
Section IV: Artist Portal & Copyright Online Statement Access
The Cash-Out feature is provided as an accommodation to artists and participants. SME has the right, in its sole and absolute discretion, to
approve or reject any Cash-Out requests. The approval or rejection of a Cash-Out request does not negate any provisions contained in
contract(s) with SME. The Cash-Out request does not create a separate contractual right to receive cash payments beyond the terms
contained in contracts with SME. Artists and participants should rely on advice from their own tax advisors when signing up to the Cash-Out
feature. An artist or participant can make one Cash-Out request in any 30 day period. Subject to satisfying local invoicing requirements,
Cash-Out requests submitted on or before the 10th day of any month will be settled on or around the 15th day of that month, while Cash-Out
requests submitted after the 10th of any month will be settled by the 15th of the following month.
 5f. Artist E-mail Address for Cash-Out Notification:
 5e. Company Name:
 5d.Telephone Number:
 5c. E-mail Address:
 5b. Last Name:
 5a. First Name:
 Note: Cash Out access is currently only available to Artist/Producer vendors and JV vendors. The authorized e-mail address
 cannot be a general or shared E-mail account.
Section V: Cash-Out Authorization (Not Applicable to Copyright Vendors)
V18
Thank you for assisting us in maintaining up to date records regarding your royalty account. Once your form is received by Sony Music, your change
request will be reviewed. We will contact you if additional supporting documentation is required in order to ensure the accuracy and validity of your
request. Sony Music reserves the right to require you to sign and deliver an affidavit affirming the information provided to Sony Music herein.
*TODAY’S DATE:
             /         /
          *AUTHORIZED SIGNER’S
            NAME:
          *AUTHORIZED SIGNER’S
            SIGNATURE:
By signing below, I warrant and represent that: (a) I have full and complete authority to request
the electronic payment method set forth herein to the account(s) referenced above, and, if the
party requesting such payment method is an entity, I am fully authorized to act and request such
update on behalf of such entity; (b) the implementation of the update requested herein will not
violate or infringe upon the rights of any other party; (c) the information stated herein is truthful
and accurate; and (d) I shall indemnify and hold Sony Music Entertainment harmless against
any and all claims and any and all damages, losses or expenses Sony Music Entertainment may
incur by reason of implementation of the update requested herein and/or as a result of the
breach of any of the foregoing warranties and representations.
Please check here to confirm a W-9 Tax Form (U.S. resident),  W-8BEN, W-8BEN-E or 8233 (non U.S. resident)
       has been attached.
If a tax form is not provided, Sony Music Entertainment may be required to withhold taxes from your royalty payment.


--- PAGE BREAK ---

Instructions for completing the Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form
The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration form must be completed by all Royalty Participants & JV Partners in order to sign up for the
following services:
1) Electronic Payments by ACH (US Only) or Wire (non-US), 2) Artist Portal Access, & 3) Cash-Out Authorization.
Please note that enrollment in Electronic Payments, either by ACH or Wire, is required in order to register for Artist Portal Access & Cash-Out
Authorization.
The Sony Music Multi-Purpose Registration Form must be accompanied by a W9 Tax Form for U.S. residents and a W8-BEN, W8-BEN-E, or
8233 for non U.S. residents.
Failure to properly complete the form and provide a valid tax document may result in delays in processing.
Preparer_Information
The information being requested in this section is for the individual who is completing the form and not necessarily the payee or individual
requesting Artist Portal Access or Cash Out Authorization.
Section_I:_Type_of_Request_(Required)
Please select the appropriate type of request that best fits your registration needs. Multiple requests can be selected, if applicable.
See below.
 Electronic payment information is required for Artist Portal access and Cash-Out authorization. This section can be skipped if the vendor is
     already enrolled in an electronic payment method.
 If you are an existing Artist Portal user who would like to request Cash-Out authorization, and the vendor(s) are already enrolled in 
     electronic payment, you are only required to fill out Section VI: Cash-Out Authorization.
Section_II:_Vendor_Information_(Required)
In this section, please select the vendor type. The request(s) in the form can be applied to multiple vendor types, but will only be
applied to the vendor name specified in field 2b. Please submit a set of forms for each different vendor name (i.e., If you have vendors
named You Productions, Inc. and You Entertainment, Inc., please submit two sets of forms).
Vendor Name/JV Deal Name -The name of the individual/entity authorized to receive royalties/payments or the name of your JV Deal as it 
     exists on the JV Statement
 Vendor Number - Vendor number as it appears on your Royalty Summary Statement
 Royalty Account Number - Contract number that appears in the header of the Royalty Summary Statement
 Address - Current vendor address that appears on your Royalty Summary Statement or JV Statement
 Email Address - Please provide an email address that SME can use for payment remittance notices
Section_III:_Vendor_Bank_Information
*This section should only be completed if you are setting up Electronic Banking for the first time or are changing existing banking
details.
Bank Account Type - Please select Checking or Savings.
Bank Account Holder Name - Individual or company name as it appears on the bank account (not bank name)
Bank Account Number - Bank account number the payments will be deposited to
Bank Name - Name of financial institution (i.e. Bank of America, Royal Bank of Canada)
Bank Address - Address of financial institution, including zip or postal code
U.S. Bank Account Routing Number/FED ABA - Nine digit routing code (please refer to the financial institution for this information)
IBAN - 18 to 34 alphanumeric code used for foreign banks (please refer to the financial institution for this information)
SWIFT/BIC - 8 to 11 characters used to identify a specific bank in an international transaction
Bank Key - Same as the routing number
Branch Number - 5 digit # used mainly in Canada to identify a bank branch.
Intermediary Bank Name - Name of intermediary financial institution. Please verify the intermediary bank with your primary financial institution
Intermediary Bank FED ABA/Routing Number - Provided by intermediary financial institution
Intermediary Bank Address - Address of intermediary financial institution
Section_IV:_Artist_Portal_&_Copyright_Online_Statement_Access
*This section should only be completed if you are registering for the Artist Portal for the first time or making changes to existing
access.
Please list the name and contact information of the individuals that you are authorizing to access the Artist Portal on behalf of the vendor listed
on line 2b.
Section_V:_Cash-Out_Authorization
Please list the name and contact information of the individual that you are authorizing to request Cash-Out on your royalty accounts. Please note
that only one registered user can have access to this functionality per vendor. Please include all account numbers and JV deal names
associated with your request.
The email address of the individual that you are authorizing to request cash withdrawals cannot be a generic or shared mailbox such as
royalty.tracking@mycompany.com.
Authorized Signer - The Authorized Signer is an individual who is authorized by the party contractually entitled to royalties from Sony Music to
request and sign off on the requests being made in this form. Sony Music may require additional documentation, in its sole discretion, to confirm
that the signatory of this form is authorized.
